text: In the first image, I feel a sense of anticipation in this open, modern space—its emptiness invites my presence and contemplation, while the scattered beanbags and soft light evoke a calm readiness for ideas to gather. In the second image, surrounded by colors and words celebrating research and discovery, I feel inspired and curious; the interplay of technology, art, and information nudges me toward reflection about the future and my own place in shaping it.
